characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit controls an objective, that objective is secured by your army.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of one or more objectives, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this unit was selected as the target of one or more of that enemy unit's attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+2"

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time this unit or a model in this unit is destroyed as a result of its Ruptured Shell ability, it does not count towards scoring any mission objectives.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: This unit is eligible to shoot, declare a charge and start an action in a turn in which it made a fall-back move.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time this unit ends a charge move, select one enemy unit within engagement range of this unit: that enemy unit must make a battle-shock roll.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is Isolated, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time this unit ends a charge move, select one enemy unit within engagement range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: In your Shooting phase, when this unit has resolved its attacks, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit is confused until the start of your next Command phase. While a unit is confused, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the hit roll and 1 to the wound roll.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brutes
■ Knights

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it advanced.

characteristics.name: Description
characteristics.$text: This unit's melee weapons have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

sharedRules.name: Acid Blood
sharedRules.description: Each time a model with this ability loses a wound as a result of a melee attack, roll one D6: on a 6, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

sharedRules.name: In the Walls
sharedRules.description: If your Army Faction is XENOMORPHS, models from your army with this ability have a detection range of 9" while they are within a terrain area that contains one or more dense terrain features.

sharedRules.name: Isolation
sharedRules.description:
If your Army Faction is XENOMORPHS, while an enemy unit is more than 6" horizontally away from any other enemy unit, that unit is Isolated. 

Each time a XENOMORPHS unit from your army makes an attack that targets an Isolated unit, improve the BS/WS characteristic of that attack by 1.
